83b4432c-868b-48a1-9e17-6452dc01e461.content:
Momentum                                             definition                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                

         •    Introduce                       variable                  v ,    or       velocity                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
         •      It     is     the         direction                    and          speed                at      which                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
              parameters                           move               through                   parameter                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
              space                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
         •      Momentum                             in      physics                 is     mass              times                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
              velocity                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
         •      The           momentum                             algorithm                       assumes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
              unit          mass                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
         •    A     hyperparameter                                      α     ε    [0,1)            determines                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
              exponential                          decay

befea4c5-7467-4c41-97f4-367edbccaef9.content:
Adagrad                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                  •   This         is    because                it    uses         different               learning               rates          for      each           iteration.                                                                                                                                                             
                  •     The         change               in    learning               rate         depends                 upon           the       difference                  in     the       parameters                                                                                                                                     
                      during             training.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                  •   The         more           the        parameters                     get        changed,                  the       more            minor            the       learning               rate                                                                                                                                
                      changes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                  •   This         modification                      is    highly           beneficial                 because                 real-world                  datasets                contain                                                                                                                                      
                      sparse             as      well        as      dense            features.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                  •   So       it   is    unfair           to     have          the        same            value          of     learning                rate        for      all     the       features.                                                                                                                                       
                  •   Individually                    adapts              learning               rates          of     all    params                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                  •   By      scaling             them            inversely                proportional                      to     the       sum          of     the       historical                squared                                                                                                                                   
                      values             of     the       gradient                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                  •   Performs                 well         for      some            but       not        all     deep          learning

                     properly     documented.                                                                                                                                                                   

                     6.Regular          Vehicle         Checking:-           Vehicles        are      widely       used       for                                                                               

                     transportation, delivery, and street-level supply of ganja. Regular vehicle                                                                                                                

                     checking      is essential     for  interception      of  transport      movement.                                                                                                         

                     a. Target     Vehicles                                                                                                                                                                     

                             Two-wheelers         used    by  local   peddlers                                                                                                                                 

                             Autos    used    for  local   delivery                                                                                                                                            

                             Private    cars                                                                                                                                                                   

                             Goods     carriers                                                                                                                                                                

                             Tourist    vehicles                                                                                                                                                               

                             Interstate     vehicles                                                                                                                                                           

                             Parcel    vans                                                                                                                                                                    

                             Ride-sharing        vehicles    used    for  delivery                                                                                                                             
                     b.  Operational       Strategy                                                                                                                                                             

                             Conduct      regular     vehicle    checks     at  vulnerable      entry   and    exit  points                                                                                    

                             Focus    on   suspicious       movement        during    night    hours                                                                                                           

                             Check     concealed      cavities,    modified      compartments,          and   luggage                                                                                          
                              carriers                                                                                                                                                                          

                             Verify   vehicle    ownership       and    travel   pattern                                                                                                                       

                             Use   mobile     checking      teams     on  surprise     routes                                                                                                                  

                             Intercept     vehicles    based     on   technical     and   human       intelligence                                                                                             

                     c. Vulnerable       Points                                                                                                                                                                 

                             District    entry   points                                                                                                                                                        

                             Highway      junctions

                             Chandragiri       route                                                                                                                                                           

                             Urban     bypass     roads

                     routine.

7c85cbb8-d555-4fe9-bbcc-c11bc84799e5.content:
Product                probability                      works              better           when             we        have           a    few         items            to     predict,                                                                                                                                         
                but       this        is     not       the        case         with          real-life               model              predictions.                                                                                                                                                                                            
                For        instance,                  if   we        have           a    class          full        of     1000            students,                 the        product                                                                                                                                                         
                probabilities                       will         always               be      closer             to     0,     regardless                    of     how           good            your                                                                                                                                          
                model              is.     If     we       also         change                one         probability ,                    the       product                will         change                                                                                                                                                 
                drastically                    and        give          the       wrong               impression                      that        a    model              performs                   well.                                                                                                                                      
                So,        we        need          to      transform                    the       products                  to     a    sum          using            a    logarithmic                                                                                                                                                          
                function.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                Log          Model A:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                log(0.1)                +     log(         0.7)        +     log(         0.6)         +    log(         0.2)                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                -1       +       -0.154                   +        -0.221                     +    -0.698                  =    -2.073                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                Log          Model               B:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                log(0.8)                +     log(         0.6)        +     log(         0.7)           +    log(         0.9)                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                  -0.09           +     -0.22           +     -0.15             +    -0.045              =     -0.505

01dec48b-b753-4578-b2f4-6cb4f4bd9011.content:
4.     ReLU(                 Rectified                   Linear                unit) Activation                                 function                                                                                                                                                                                                     

   •   Rectified           linear       unit     or   ReLU         is   most       widely         used      activation           function.          Range         is   from       0   to   infinity.                                                                                                                                            

   •   It   is  converging              quickly.         So,     Fast     Computation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          

   Disadvantage:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                

   •   Dying         ReLU          problem:             when        inputs       approach            zero,      or   negative,           the    gradient         of    the    function          becomes            zero.                                                                                                                        

   •   It   leads      to   the     weights         and      biases       for    some        neurons          are     not    updated          during         the    backpropagation                   process.          This      can                                                                                                           

       create        dead      neurons          which         never       get    activated.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     

   •   To     avoid       this     unfitting,         use     Leaky         ReLU         function          instead         of   ReLU.                                                                                                                                                                                                           

   •     Leaky        ReLU          range       is   expanded            to   enhance           the    performance.

SGD                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           

            •    computation                             time            per         update                  does             not         INCREASE                          with           the                                                                                                                                                  
                 number                    of      training                  examples.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
            •    This           allows               convergence                              even             when               the         number                    of      training                                                                                                                                                        
                 examples                       becomes                      very            large.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
            •    For         a     large            enough                    dataset,                   SGD            may            converge                       to      within               some                                                                                                                                         
                 fixed            tolerance                     of       its      final          test          set        error            before                it    has          processed                                                                                                                                                   
                 the         entire              training                 set

d2327d34-cf91-4f64-96ac-8c1a8dd00416.content:
L1            Regularization(Lasso                                                                         Regularization)                                                                                                                                                                                                                  

     •    L1       regularization                              works               by        adding                 a     penalty                  term            to       the         model.                                                                                                                                                  

     •    This           penalty                 results                in     making                   some               coefficients                        in      the         model                to       0.                                                                                                                             

     •    Discards                    the         model                weights                   that          might               be        random                   noise,               or      any           other                                                                                                                          
          unimportant                             associations                           or      outliers                 in      the         data                                                                                                                                                                                              

     •    Using              this,          features                   which               does             not         contribute                        towards                   prediction                       could                                                                                                                      
          be       removed.

b7274b29-e284-4301-a629-9964d0176f42.content:
Nesterov                                  Momentum                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
              •    A     variant                to       accelerate                       gradient,                     with           update                                                                                                                                                                                                   

                                •    where          parameters                α    and      ε   play       a   similar         role      as    in   the      standard                                                                                                                                                                           
                                     momentum                  method                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                       •    Difference                  between                  Nesterov                 and         standard                 momentum                        is    where                                                                                                                                                      
                            gradient               is    evaluated.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                •    Nesterov             gradient           is   evaluated              after       the      current          velocity          is   applied.                                                                                                                                                                  
                                •    Thus        one       can      interpret           Nesterov             as     attempting               to    add       a   correction              factor                                                                                                                                                 
                                     to    the     standard             method            of    momentum

7a09e53c-d410-4e8a-a005-7070b4d6e502.content:
RMSProp(Root                                                Mean                     Squred                        Error                  Propogation)                                                                                                                                                        
             •   The       algorithm             mainly          focuses           on     accelerating                the      optimization                process            by    decreasing                the                                                                                                                               
                 number             of    function           evaluations               to    reach         the      local      minimum.                                                                                                                                                                                                         
             •   The       algorithm             keeps          the     moving            average            of    squared            gradients             for    every         weight          and                                                                                                                                            
                 divides          the      gradient           by     the      square          root      of    the      mean          square.                                                                                                                                                                                                    
             •   Modifies            AdaGrad             for     a   nonconvex                setting                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                      •   Change            gradient            accumulation                   into      exponentially                 weighted              moving           average                                                                                                                                                           
                      •   Converges                rapidly         when         applied           to    convex           function                                                                         Moving                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                         average

ba34afcc-176a-430f-8ab9-2a0e9db8ebb2.content:
COMPLETE              DPR      FORMAT                                                                                                                       

                      NDPS      ACCUSED           MONITORING              &   INTELLIGENCE              MANAGEMENT                                                                                              
                                                            WEB     APPLICATION                                                                                                                                 

                     DETAILED         PROJECT         REPORT         (DPR)                                                                                                                                      

                     1.Cover      Page                                                                                                                                                                          

                     Title:  GARUDA                                                                                                                                                                             
                              Detailed      Project     Report      (DPR)     For    NDPS       Accused       Monitoring        &                                                                               

                     Intelligence       Management           Web      Application        by    Tirupati      district     Police                                                                                

                     department.                                                                                                                                                                                

                     2.Executive        Summary         :-                                                                                                                                                      

                              This project proposes development of a centralized secure web-                                                                                                                    

                     based platform for monitoring, surveillance, intelligence gathering, and                                                                                                                   

                     analysis     of NDPS      accused      persons,     habitual      offenders,     interstate     narcotics                                                                                  

                     traffickers,     and   organized      drug    networks.                                                                                                                                    

                     The   system     will  enable:                                                                                                                                                             

                             Centralized      accused      database                                                                                                                                            

                             Intelligence     sharing                                                                                                                                                          

                             Surveillance       monitoring                                                                                                                                                     

                             Link   analysis                                                                                                                                                                   

                             GIS   crime    mapping                                                                                                                                                            

                             Real-time      reporting                                                                                                                                                          

                             AI-based      analytics     (future    scope)                                                                                                                                     

                              The   application       will  strengthen       intelligence-led       policing    and    improve                                                                                  

                     anti-narcotics       enforcement        efficiency.                                                                                                                                        

                     3.  Introduction         :-                                                                                                                                                                

                              Drug     trafficking       and     narcotics-related          crimes      have     emerged       as                                                                               

                     serious      threats      affecting     public      safety,     youth,     and     law     enforcement.                                                                                    

                     Presently,       offender-related          information          is   fragmented          across      police                                                                                

                     stations    and    units.                                                                                                                                                                  

                              To   address     this   issue,    a  centralized       NDPS     accused       monitoring       web                                                                                

                     application      is proposed       for:                                                                                                                                                    

                             Criminal      intelligence     management                                                                                                                                         

                             Habitual     offender     tracking                                                                                                                                                

                             Interstate     coordination                                                                                                                                                       

                             Surveillance       operations                                                                                                                                                     

                             Data-driven       enforcement

b80e6f82-0ae7-45f4-b4c2-902e92fcf404.content:
•    The           training                 process                   based               on        minimizing                         this                                                                                                                                                                                              
            average                    training                 error            is     known                  as       empirical                     risk                                                                                                                                                                                      
            minimization.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
       •    Machine                     learning                   is    still        very           similar               to                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
            straightforward                                  optimization.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
       •    Rather                 than            optimizing                       the          risk        directly ,                optimize                                                                                                                                                                                                 
            the         empirical                     risk                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
       •    But          empirical                    risk         minimization                             is     not          very           useful:                                                                                                                                                                                          
                1.Prone                to     overfitting:                   can        simply            memorize                    training              set                                                                                                                                                                                 
                2.SGD              is    commonly                     used,           but       many             useful           loss        functions                                                                                                                                                                                         
                have           0-1        loss,        with         no       useful           derivatives                   (derivative                   is                                                                                                                                                                                    
                either            0    or     undefined                   everywhere)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
       •    We          must             use          a     slightly                different                   approach                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                •      Quantity                we        must           optimize                is    even          more           different                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                     from          what           we       truly         want           to     optimize

Advantages                                       and               Disadvantages-                                                 Early                 Stopping                                                                                                                                                                         

       •    Advantages                            :                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                •    Time           and        computational                          resources                   could           be       saved            by      decreasing                     the       no.       of                                                                                                                       
                     epochs                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                •    More           suitable              when            the       network                is    complex                 since           it   might           take         more                                                                                                                                                 
                     amount               of     time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                •    Reduce                the       overfitting                 by      acting           as      a     regularizer                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                •    Memorization                         could           be       avoided                so      that       generalization                         about            the       new          data                                                                                                                                
                     could           be      attained               and         thus         performance                        could           be       improved                                                                                                                                                                               
       •    Disadvantages:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                •    Sensitive                 to    the       choice             of     the       validation                 set                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                •    If   small          validation                 set       is    used           ,  then         the       network                might           stop         too       early          or     too                                                                                                                            
                     late

931ff85b-7a61-4884-ad44-cb2bf67802c4.content:
Building                    Neural                Network                     Model                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            

    1.       W eight initialization                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             

    2.       Forward         propagation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
    3.       Loss     (or cost) computation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     

    4.       Backpropagation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    

    5.       W eight update             using optimization algorithm.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
    Weight initialization                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       

    1.  Zero Initialization (Symmetry                          Problem)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
            •   When        Initialize       all   weights        of   a neural       network         as   zero,     neural       network         will    become         a  linear     model        i.e.,   all  the    partial                                                                                                                 

                derivatives           in   backpropagation                will     be    the    same       for    every      neuron.        So,     Parameters            are    not    updated.         Hence,        should                                                                                                                   

                avoid to initialize all weights to zero                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    2.W eight initialized with too-small                            values (V anishing               Gradient Problem)                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
            •   Model        will    be converged             earlier.      It  indicated        as   model        performance improves                     very      slowly       during       training       and it     stops                                                                                                                 

                very early.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
            •   If   the   initial     weights         of   a  neuron        are    too    small      relative       to   the    inputs,      the    gradient        of    the   hidden        layers      will     diminish                                                                                                                    

                exponentially in back propagation i.e., vanishing through the                                                  layers.                                                                                                                                                                                                          
            •   Use     ReLu or leaky              ReLu to avoid vanishing gradient.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
    3.  T oo-large          Initialization (Exploding Gradient)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
            •   Loss value will oscillate around minima                                  but unable to            converge                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
            •   Model involves much                      change in         its loss      value on        each update            due to its instability, may                   reach infinity sometimes.                                                                                                                                         
            •   Use     ReLu or leaky              ReLu to avoid Exploding gradient.

dc02c027-f66a-4c35-8710-5ad90c5b7b70.content:
Activation                 functions               are      an     extremely               important                feature           of    the      artificial            neural                                                                                                                                                 
              networks.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
              They          basically              decide           whether              a   neuron            should           be     activated              or     not.                                                                                                                                                                       
              Whether               the      information                   that      the      neuron            is    receiving              is    relevant            for      the      given                                                                                                                                                  
              information                   or    should            it   be     ignored.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
              Can          we      do      without              an      activation                 function?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
              When            we       do     not      have         the      activation               function             the      weights             and       bias       would            simply            do     a                                                                                                                        
              linear         transformation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
              A    linear          equation              is    simple           to    solve         but      is   limited            in    its    capacity             to     solve        complex                                                                                                                                              
              problems.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
              A    neural           network              without             an     activation               function             is    essentially                just      a   linear          regression                                                                                                                                     
              model.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
              The        activation               function             does         the     non-linear                 transformation                        to    the      input        making                                                                                                                                                 
              it   capable              to    learn         and       perform              more         complex               tasks.

b7ecaa44-9d83-437e-8e8c-e35e483f15d3.content:
•    Assume                  a    dataset                has                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
     •    Blood             sample                of      p1       taken             @       3    different                 times.                                                                                                                                                                                                              
     •    Blood             sample                of      p2       taken             @       5    different                 times……                                                                                                                                                                                                             
     •    How           SGD,             minibatch                    and          Batch             GD         will       show             its                                                                                                                                                                                                 
          performance?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          

     •    SGD:              Poor           generalization,                             High           Bias          and         High                                                                                                                                                                                                            
          variance                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
     •    Mini         batch             :   If     sequentially                        framed                as      a     batch,              the                                                                                                                                                                                             
          same             results              will       be       obtained                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
     •    If    shuffling                  is    done,             bias          and         variance                  might              be                                                                                                                                                                                                    
          mitigated.                    Generalization                             might             be       improved                     a    bit                                                                                                                                                                                             
     •    BGD:             Bias         and          Variance                  will        be       low.

ad41ad53-ea57-4bf1-a86b-5d63d7acd5bb.content:
•    Reduces                     the         learning                   rate          for        the         significant                      features                   and                                                                                                                                                          
               increases                      the         learning                   rate          for        the         insignificant                          features.                                                                                                                                                                      

                   A    big    drawback               of    Adagrad             is   that       as    time        goes       by,     the      learning           rate      becomes               smaller                                                                                                                                        
                   and       smaller           due      to    the      monotonic                increment               of    the      running           squared            sum.

8b8cacda-da11-40d0-8257-cf5216a13f66.content:
Adam:                        Adaptive                             Moments                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
 •    Yet       another               adaptive                 learning               rate        optimization                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
      algorithm                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
 •      Variant             of     RMSProp                   with         momentum                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
 •    Generally                 robust             to     the       choice             of                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
      hyperparameters                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
 •    In     Adam             instead              of     adapting                 learning               rates                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
      based            on       the       average                first       moment                  (s)      as      in                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
      RMSP ,            Adam             makes             use         of     the       average                of     the                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
      second              moments(r)of                           the       gradients.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
 •    This         algorithm                 calculates                  the        exponential                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
      moving               average                of     gradients                 and         square                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
      gradients.

      averages.

eb72d2f9-96cb-46d4-b150-8f3118fbb1d6.content:
•   Dropout                     randomly                      inactivates                        a     few          neurons                    in      each             layer .                                                                                                                                                           

      •   This           deactivation                            of      neurons                    vary           in      each             epochs                                                                                                                                                                                              

      •   Dropout                     is     done             by        specifying                      with           the          ‘p’      avalues(no                         of      neurons                    to       be                                                                                                                  
          dropped)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              

      •   Dependencies                                  of      neurons                    on        other             neurons                    are         reduced                    and           thus           it                                                                                                                        
          results                in      the         model                to      behave                   robustly                                                                                                                                                                                                                             

      •   Dropout                     is     applied                 only           during                the         model                training                 phase                and           is    not                                                                                                                                
          applied                  during                the         inference                     phase.

36fb76ab-5620-4a07-b2cd-9485307af015.content:
The         major             drawback                     of      the       sigmoid                 activation                   function                 is     to     create            a                                                                                                                               
                     vanishing                    gradient                problem.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              

                     This          is    the       Non           zero          Centered Activation                                      Function                                                                                                                                                                                                

                     The         model              Learning                   rate        is     slow                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          

                     Create              a   V anishing                   gradient                 problem.-                   The          output              of     the       logistic                                                                                                                                                       
                     function                 is    not        symmetric                      around               zero.           So       the       output              of     all      the       neurons                                                                                                                                     
                     will        be       of     the       same            sign.          This          makes               the       training                of     the       neural                                                                                                                                                           
                     network                 more            difficult               and         unstable.

548a4da6-bd0c-4707-8f03-719a1833fcd0.content:
Surrogate                                     loss                function                              actually                             results                         in         being                                                                                                                                       
            able                 to          learn                    more.                        How???                               GIVE                     AN              EXAMPLE                                                                                                                                                        
         •   A     surrogate                  loss        function               allows            a    model             to     learn          more            effectively                 by      providing                                                                                                                                   
             a    more            tractable                optimization                      problem                compared                    to     the        original             loss        function                                                                                                                                     
             of     interest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
         •   0-1          Loss:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
         •   If     the         model                 predicts                  "cat"            but         the         true           label            is     "dog,"               loss          =      1.                                                                                                                                    
         •   If     the         model                 predicts                  "dog"              but          the         true          label            is     "cat,"             loss          =      1.                                                                                                                                    
         •   Otherwise                         (correct                  prediction),                         loss          =      0.
