0cc97e98-ffa1-40ca-a068-296ccf539769.content:
Algorithms                                        with                  an            adaptive                                learning                              rate                                                                                                                                                      
          •    In      a     neural                network,                     setting                the         learning                   rate          is     too         difficult                since             it                                                                                                                    
               has          a    great              impact                 on       the          performance                              of      the         model.                                                                                                                                                                            
          •    The           momentum                             algorithm                      can          mitigate                    these              issues              somewhat,                           but                                                                                                                        
               does            so       at       the         expense                    of       introducing                         another                   hyperparameter                                                                                                                                                                   
          •    delta-bar-delta                                is     an        early            heuristic                   approach                       used             for        adapting                                                                                                                                                 
               individual                     learning                   rates            for        model                parameters                           during                training.                                                                                                                                                  
                   •    The         approach                  is    based            on       a    simple             idea:                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                   •      if   the       partial           derivative                  of     the       loss,         with         respect              to     a    given           model             parameter ,                                                                                                                               
                        remains               the        same            sign,         then          the       learning               rate         should             increase.                                                                                                                                                                 
                   •    If    the       partial           derivative                  with         respect              to     that         parameter                    changes                sign,          then                                                                                                                             
                        the       learning               rate        should              decrease.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                   •    Of      course,              this       kind         of     rule        can        only         be      applied              to     full      batch            optimization

c5176756-1d3a-4639-8bf0-cde0deb57c50.content:
Delta             rule          learning                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  

      •    Perceptron                 rule       works           perfectly              for      linearly            separable               data.        But       it   fails       to    converge               for      the      not                                                                                                         

           linearly           separable                data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    

      •    Delta         rule       overcomes                  this       limitation              that       learns          the     weights              for     non-linear                dataset.                                                                                                                                            

      •    It   converges                 towards             a   best       fit    approximation                        target         output.                                                                                                                                                                                                 

      •    T o    attain         this,       apply          gradient             descent             to    search           hypothesis                 space          of     possible             weight            vectors            to                                                                                                       

           find       weights             that      best        fit   with         the     training            examples.                                                                                                                                                                                                                        

      •    Delta         rule       is    the      basis         for      backpropagation                          that       learns          the      network               with        many           interconnected                                                                                                                          

           neuron            units.

9eef64fb-c9f3-4ff4-970d-64d07707140a.content:
Problems                   in     neural             network                 -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 

         Early-stopping                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
         •     Use     validation         error     to   decide       when      to   stop     training                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
         •     Stop     when       monitored           quantity        has    not    improved          after    n   subsequent           epochs                                                                                                                                                                                                 

         Dropout                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
         •    Dropout makes                some      weights will           be randomly             set to     zero.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
         •    E.g., weights= [0.1,                1.7, 0.7,       -0.9].                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
         •    After     apply dropout,              it becomes [0.1,              0,  0,   -0.9] with randomly                  distributed 0.                                                                                                                                                                                                  
         •    The     dropout        rate    parameter controls how                      many       weights to be set to zeroes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                
         •    Having        a rate     between 0.2 and                0.5 is common.

d97a8b20-5ae1-41be-9bea-62a3f0c5d61a.content:
SGD-Contd..                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 

      •   Crucial               parameter                      –     Learning                  rate                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
      •   During               the         iterations,                   the        learning                 rate          shall          be       decreased.                                                                                                                                                                                   
      •   In      BGD,             the        learning                 rate         is     fixed           as      during              iterations,                    it   might              be       0.                                                                                                                                       
      •   Batch                Gradient                      Descent,                      which              consistently                        uses           the        entire            dataset                and                                                                                                                        
          converges                      smoothly ,                    SGD             introduces                     noise            due          to      the        randomness                           of                                                                                                                                  
          sampling.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
      •   Each            update                is    based              on       a     single            randomly                     chosen                sample,                 and          the        gradient                                                                                                                           
          can         fluctuate                  rather              than          steadily                decrease.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
      •   Batch                Gradient                      Descent                     uses           the         true         gradient                  of     the         entire            dataset                at                                                                                                                       
          every             step,           so      as       we        get        closer             to      the        minimum,                       the        gradient                 becomes                                                                                                                                              
          smaller                and         smaller .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
      •   As       a     result,            Batch              Gradient                  Descent                  can         smoothly                    approach                    the         minimum                                                                                                                                       
          and          stop          when              the        gradient                  reaches                 zero,           meaning                   that          the        weight               updates                                                                                                                             
          become                   smaller               and          eventually                     cease.

32b09842-5480-4065-a008-005e1425768e.content:
    Consumer        clustering     patterns                                                                                                                                           

                              This will shift enforcement from reactive policing to predictive and                                                                                                              

                     preventive      policing.                                                                                                                                                                  

                              The     enforcement         against      ganja      peddling      and     NDPS       crimes      in                                                                               

                     Tirupati      District      must      be    intelligence-led,         technology-enabled,             field-                                                                               

                     focused, and continuously monitored. Random and isolated enforcement                                                                                                                       

                     actions      will    not    produce       lasting      impact.      A    structured        enforcement                                                                                     

                     mechanism          integrating       human        intelligence,      field   operations,        technical                                                                                  

                     surveillance, offender databases, and predictive policing is essential to                                                                                                                  

                     dismantle      the   drug    ecosystem       in the   district.                                                                                                                            

                              Only     sustained,        coordinated,        and     data-driven         enforcement         can                                                                                

                     effectively      suppress        the    NDPS       menace        and     prevent       the    growth       of                                                                              

                     organized      drug    networks      in  Tirupati     District.
